  • Uses of AbstractData in controller.contracts

    Classes in controller.contracts with type parameters of type AbstractData
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    IDataPanelListener<DataT extends AbstractData>
    Defines a listener interface for responding to user actions on a data panel that displays or manages AbstractData items.

  • Uses of AbstractData in model

    Classes in model with type parameters of type AbstractData
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractCollection<DataT extends AbstractData>
    Abstract data model that provides the tools to manage a collection of AbstractData items.
    Subclasses of AbstractData in model
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractCollection<DataT extends AbstractData>
    Abstract data model that provides the tools to manage a collection of AbstractData items.
    class 
    Checklist
    Defines a checklist that can contain multiple Task items while extending AbstractCollection to provide list tools, observability and serialization.
    class 
    Task
    Defines a single task, modelled with a title and additional details as well a completion status, priority, deadline and creation date.
    class 
    Workspace
    Defines a workspace that maintains multiple Checklist items while extending AbstractCollection to provide list tools, observability and serialization.

    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractView<DataT extends AbstractData>
    An abstract view component that observes an AbstractData object.

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected DataT
    AbstractView.observedData
    The data object that this view is observing.

  • Uses of AbstractData in view.dialogs

    Classes in view.dialogs with type parameters of type AbstractData
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractDialog<DataT extends AbstractData>
    Abstract base class for creating modal dialogs that edit or manipulate a specific type of data.
    class 
    AbstractTitleEditDialog<DataT extends AbstractData>
    Abstract base class for dialogs that allow the user to edit an AbstractData object.
    class 
    ClearCollectionDialog<CollectionT extends AbstractCollection<DataT>, DataT extends AbstractData>
    Defines a confirmation dialog for clearing all contents of a collection.
    class 
    DeleteDataDialog<DataT extends AbstractData>
    Defines a confirmation dialog for deleting data entities.
    class 
    RenameDataDialog<DataT extends AbstractData>
    Defines a dialog for renaming an AbstractData object.
    Fields in view.dialogs declared as AbstractData
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected final DataT
    AbstractDialog.dataToWorkWith
    The data object that this dialog will manipulate.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractCollectionPage<CollectionT extends AbstractCollection<DataT>, DataT extends AbstractData>
    Base class for pages that display a list of data items inside a scrollable view.
